findings.problem: The chapter's largest turn lands first as semantic explanation rather than as an unforgettable human choice. Once the hostile-wand clause appears, the prose spends multiple beats defining terms and asserting certainty, so the refusal reads as an elegant mechanism before it reads as a devastating irreversible act. That keeps the set piece below shortlist-level force.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:127, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:131, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:163, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:181, compress the legal-style gloss and spend that space on one or two concrete imagined consequences aboveground tied to named people or bodily outcomes. Keep Owen's analytic frame, but make the instant of possibility and the instant of withdrawal register as human cost before the narration returns to abstraction.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised clause-reveal/refusal sequence at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:127, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:163, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:181 includes at least one concrete aboveground consequence anchored to a named person or bodily image before Owen withdraws, and no more than one consecutive paragraph of abstract term-definition follows the clause's first appearance. FAIL if the beat is still carried primarily by semantic explanation.

findings.problem: The combat-ending clause becomes legible and trustworthy too cleanly for a hinge this consequential. The chapter does explain why the branch surfaces now, but Owen moves from noticing marginal bars to full confidence in the reading and its battle-scale effect in one smooth interpretive pass, which makes the discovery feel partly handed to him at the exact moment the plot needs it.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:121, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:123, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:135, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:153, add one genuine obstacle to legibility before certainty locks in: a failed inference, a partial reading, or an explicit limitation/collateral effect Owen must reason through. Keep the clause, but show why it stayed dormant, why nobody else has used it, and what it would not solve, instead of letting the chapter jump straight from sighting to mastery.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised discovery span at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:121, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:123, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:135, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:153 explicitly answers all three plausibility questions on the page: why the clause becomes readable now, why nobody has already used it, and what immediate limitation or collateral effect keeps it from reading as a free plot handout. FAIL if Owen still reaches full confidence in a single clean interpretive pass without any local obstacle or limit.

findings.problem: The chapter overuses corrective-negation sentence templates: `It was not ...`, `X did not mean ... It meant ...`, `He had not ...`. By the time Owen reaches the refusal, the prose is repeatedly parsing terms in the same shape instead of varying rhythm and pressure, which turns a strong conceptual voice into a detectable tic.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:123, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:131, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:141, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:193, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:203, keep at most one or two deliberate corrective-negation turns and convert the rest into different sentence shapes or physical/consequential beats. Let some meaning arrive through image, pressure, or action instead of repeated definition-by-negation.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across the revised target beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:123, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:131, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:193, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:203, no more than two corrective-negation constructions of the forms `It was not X. It was Y.`, `X did not mean Y. It meant Z.`, or `He had not ...` remain, and at least one clause meaning is conveyed through physical consequence rather than definitional contrast. FAIL if three or more such constructions still carry those beats.

summary: Strong atmosphere, material ritual labor, and character-true dialogue keep the chapter readable, but the decisive clause reveal arrives too cleanly and is over-explained at the moment it should feel most devastating. Prose-level repetition in the chapter's corrective-negation syntax compounds that flattening. Dialogue passes: Owen and Tallow remain distinct, contracted, and pressure-appropriate, with no unresolved medium-plus voice or register failures.
